description: A distribution center (DC A) is low on stock for a popular item. An inventory planner needs to create a stock transfer order to move inventory from another DC (DC B).

nodes.task_description: Check inventory levels for the item at all distribution centers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms DC A is low and DC B has a surplus.

nodes.task_description: Create a stock transfer order (STO) to move 500 units from DC B to DC A.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates the STO in the system.

nodes.task_description: The STO automatically generates an outbound order for DC B and an inbound notification for DC A.

expected_outcome.value: The system correctly creates linked transactions for both facilities.
